original: Trying to attract a terran husband? Wishing your crotch had a magnetic draw that the bestial species of the galaxy couldn't hope to resist? Look no further than this glossy, zebra print thong. The stylish white and black pattern always looks good, no matter what color pants your partner has to peel you out of.
